commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; a maintainer should decide whether the focused proof is enough for the config-repair compatibility risk and then land or request packaged-upgrade proof.; Cleared: The diff changes TypeScript path parsing, doctor repair tests, and changelog text without adding dependencies, workflows, secrets handling, or new code-execution hooks. (sha=a61096d42ac895c08074bf5a94da69e959ae3ff7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR teaches doctor to detect and remove stale old-version OpenClaw package bundled plugin load paths, adds parser helpers and regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. By source inspection, current main only recognizes active bundled aliases, so an old versioned OpenClaw package path is not repaired by doctor and can remain a missing configured plugin path.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; a maintainer should decide whether the focused proof is enough for the config-repair compatibility risk and then land or request packaged-upgrade proof.

target.title: fix(doctor): prune stale bundled plugin load paths
target.body:
## Summary

- Treat stale `plugins.load.paths` entries from old versioned `node_modules/openclaw` package roots as bundled-plugin aliases during doctor detection and repair.
- Reuse the bundled path parser for both current packaged roots and legacy `extensions/<plugin>` roots, while keeping arbitrary custom plugin paths untouched.
- Add regression coverage for old packaged and legacy bundled paths, plus a guard for unrelated paths with a similar layout.

Fixes #58626.

## Verification

- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/doctor/shared/bundled-plugin-load-paths.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/bundled-plugin-load-paths.test.ts src/plugins/bundled-load-path-aliases.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/issue-58626-wsl-bundled-paths-final node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/bundled-plugin-load-paths.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/issue-58626-wsl-discovery-final node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/discovery.test.ts -t "ignores packaged bundled plugin paths|ignores legacy bundled plugin load paths" --reporter=verbose`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache/issue-58626-wsl-bundled-paths-after-proof node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/bundled-plugin-load-paths.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox --sandbox danger-full-access review --commit HEAD`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw doctor --fix` can now prune stale bundled plugin load paths left behind from older versioned `node_modules/openclaw` package roots after pnpm/npm upgrades.

Real environment tested: WSL2 Ubuntu 24.04 checkout at commit `a61096d42ac895c08074bf5a94da69e959ae3ff7`, rebased on `upstream/main` commit `23c58081d062346b5dafb5b4a0db7f833c315b8c`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: In an isolated temporary state/config directory, seeded `plugins.load.paths` with an old-version package path `/tmp/openclaw-58626-doctor-proof/pnpm-global/.pnpm/openclaw@2026.3.28_@napi-rs+canvas@0.1.97/node_modules/openclaw/dist/extensions/feishu` plus `/tmp/openclaw-58626-doctor-proof/custom-plugin`, then ran `HOME=/tmp/openclaw-58626-doctor-proof/home OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-58626-doctor-proof/state OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-58626-doctor-proof/state/openclaw.json OPENCLAW_DISABLE_DOTENV=1 OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BUNDLED_SOURCE_OVERLAYS=1 node --import tsx -e 'import("./src/cli/run-main.ts").then(m=>m.runCli(["node","openclaw","doctor","--fix","--non-interactive","--no-workspace-suggestions"]))'`.

Evidence after fix: Before `doctor --fix`, `plugins.load.paths` contained the stale old-version OpenClaw package path and the custom path. Doctor output included `plugins.load.paths: removed bundled feishu path alias`. After `doctor --fix`, `plugins.load.paths` contained only `/tmp/openclaw-58626-doctor-proof/custom-plugin`.

Observed result after fix: `doctor --fix` removed the stale bundled Feishu alias and preserved the custom path. Formatting passed, diff whitespace check passed, `bundled-plugin-load-paths.test.ts` passed 12/12 tests, the focused discovery regression test passed 2/2 tests, and Codex review reported no actionable correctness issues.

What was not tested: No full `pnpm check` or packaged install/update E2E was run; this PR is covered with focused doctor/discovery regression tests plus isolated real CLI `doctor --fix` proof for the implicated config repair path.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
